item.title: 45 lbs weight loss
item.description: Look at my face, y’all! I don’t see the face progress irl but I really do see it in these pictures! ETA: this has taken about 10 months so it’s been slow. I haven’t done anything exciting except tracking calories in Lifesum and (obviously) eaten less. Haven’t work out much at all but I’m hoping to improve on that. :)
item.dc:creator: ssmc

item.title: Release the Mooken (no sound)
item.description: Darn, should have called it: Release the Cowken
item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: My Friend Might Not Be Human
item.description:
A oneshot indie manga created by https://lit.link/en/asaaa819 (author) and https://twitter.com/sayaaa_70 (artist). Translated by me, with permission. Enjoy!
"I think everyone deserves a friend" - Bob Ross Don't forget to also be true to yourself. I'm sure Tanuko would love Tenko all the same if she knew the truth. She certainly did get excited by the idea that her friend might be the same as her. The human friends will come eventually. Tenko's heart is in the right place, at least. Thanks for reading!
item.dc:creator: WyrdJP

item.description:
Artist: Ryota Kuwakubo https://www.ryotakuwakubo.com/
Ólafur Waage https://www.instagram.com/olafurw/
B. Dylan Hollis https://www.instagram.com/bdylanhollis
--- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag Edit: Ugh, I didn't realize the volume was so different on some of the videos. I TRIED, OKAY. Incidentally, if someone knows of a free website for adjusting the volume of a video, pls let me know, thx!
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Han Solo is annoyed right now
item.dc:creator: 1mthedude

item.title: My Zatanna Cosplay Improvement
item.description: SnarkyJayCosplay here— was editing and decided to put a little comparison together! I’m really happy with the 2024 version of my Zatanna cosplay— the suit screams “Magician” (it’s more cohesive to me) and the tights are sparkly (what more could anyone want?). Plus my edit is more dynamic: I think it flows better and looks a little more “real?” I’m no photoshop expert by any means, but I’ve certainly improved. 2023 will probably be preferred by some for a number of reasons… but hey, I feel like I’m growing as an artist and wanted to share that.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: I swear its not what it looks like...
item.dc:creator: Raoul97533

item.title: Cappuccino loves his Mama
item.description: Little boy Cappuccino is starting to get a lot more mobile. And his eyes are almost all the way open! I caught a cute little moment between him and his mama, Java. She is so patient and she loves her babies SO much. She’s one of the most attentive mama cats I’ve ever had. I’m going out of town tomorrow morning for a week and I am gonna miss these guys so much! Gotta soak up all the kitten love I can tonight. (Check out Cappy’s little sis!! https://imgur.com/gallery/Cd4hPcF )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: A truly random meme dump. Click like if you liked them. Scroll along if not. Cheers! Have a great day, Internet Strangers!
item.description:
I’ve been on a Columbo kick recently. I’m almost through watching all of them.
I would say even more iconic than Sheriff Bart inventing the Candy Gram.
The dog days ARE over!
Now imagine all the Kens walking along like a pack of male flamingos ? ?? to get the Barbie’s’ attentions.
Dang Duo.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Apocalypse-ready
item.description:
The Federal Emergency Management Agency maintains a simple metric for determining how bad off an area is during a disaster. This is known as the Waffle House Index: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Waffle_House_Index Waffle House, which never ever closes unless the building is literally flooded or the roads are completely cut off (high winds are mitigated with plywood), or their propane is gone, will go to certain menus to stretch supplies and respond to outages. "Limited" means when there are other places besides Waffle House open in an area. "Emergency" means Waffle House is the last thing operating besides Fire and Police and maybe the National Guard, who are the ones that frequent it during times of evacuation.
https://twitter.com/AnniePNJ/status/1168582629467312129/photo/1
Uploaded individually for ease of viewing (and sharing). ***INB4*** Waffle House isn't a heartless corporation that makes employees stay during disasters. They evacuate workers and have managers fly in from other states man the grills, to feed local fire, police, displaced and evacuating people, and provide cel phone charging with their backup generators.
item.dc:creator: jansenart

item.description: Done in 2015 when I was 16 years old
